example_reviews: This app really helps when I feel anxious.
It calms me down during stressful moments.
groups.notes: Refined from manual group by removing less relevant reviews and focusing on direct emotional support cases.

example_reviews: The sleep exercises are really calming.
groups.notes: Focused specifically on sleep-related use cases and removed general wellness reviews.

example_reviews: The journaling feature helps me reflect.
groups.notes: Grouped reviews that clearly mention structured reflection or CBT-based support.

example_reviews: Too many features are locked behind premium.
Not sure if the subscription is worth it.
groups.notes: Removed duplicate and unclear pricing complaints and focused on clear subscription concerns.

example_reviews: It freezes when I try to use features.
groups.notes: Refined to include only reviews mentioning crashes, freezing, or login issues.
